title: Source Ingestion, Parsing, OCR, Provenance, and Trust · Language Clinic: Rag Source Inventory Provenance
summary: A connector strips headings and page coordinates from mixed PDFs, silently skips parse failures, duplicates documents, and treats retrieved instructions as trusted application policy. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the source inventory provenance increment in provenance-preserving ingestion ledger. Learners…
objectives: Inventory source owner, authority, location, version, time, license, access policy, checksum, parser, and lineage for every ingested document.
Define stable score, tie-break, pagination, and snapshot rules so repeated retrieval is reproducible.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-ingestion-provenance-3
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-ingestion-provenance-3.
# Case 5798: a multimodal maintenance-manual release.
# Operating constraint: retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity.
# Changed case: move the only supporting passage to the middle of the context and rerun the position slice.
def worked_rag_ingestion_provenance_3(source_id: str = "manual-v3", bytes_read: int = 4096, parse_errors: int = 0, licensed: bool = True, provenance_kept: bool = True, content_trusted: bool = False) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "corpusworked3",
        "query3dekrow",
        "tenant5798",
        "indexworked35798",
        "prompt3dekrow5798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if not source_id or bytes_read < 0:
        return False, bytes_read, "source-admission"
    if parse_errors > 0:
        return False, parse_errors, "parse-quarantine"
    if not licensed or not provenance_kept:
        return False, bytes_read, "provenance-policy"
    if content_trusted:
        return False, bytes_read, "data-is-not-instruction"
    assert source_id == "manual-v3"
    return True, bytes_read, "quarantined-source"

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-source-inventory-provenance-i6zzee
# Competency: rag-source-inventory-provenance.
# Case 7056: a multilingual support escalation.
# Operating constraint: retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity.
# Changed case: change tenant, language, date, and document version and reject stale or unauthorized evidence.
def evidence_rag_source_inventory_provenance_i6zzee(source_id: str = "manual-v3", bytes_read: int = 4096, parse_errors: int = 0, licensed: bool = True, provenance_kept: bool = True, content_trusted: bool = False) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_i6zzee = "i6zzee-eezz6i-7056"
    assert evidence_variant_i6zzee
    evidence_axes_i6zzee = (
        "corpusi6zzee",
        "queryeezz6i",
        "tenant7056",
        "indexi6zzee7056",
        "prompteezz6i7056",
        "evaluation7056i6zzee",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_i6zzee)) == 6
    if not source_id or bytes_read < 0:
        return False, bytes_read, "source-admission"
    if parse_errors > 0:
        return False, parse_errors, "parse-quarantine"
    if not licensed or not provenance_kept:
        return False, bytes_read, "provenance-policy"
    if content_trusted:
        return False, bytes_read, "data-is-not-instruction"
    assert source_id == "manual-v3"
    return True, bytes_read, "quarantined-source"
